block.wnir.personal_dimension_teleporter: This portal is not attuned to you.
You must be fully fed to travel dimensions.
tooltip.wnir.chunk_loader.detail: Keeps the chunk loaded with no players nearby. Break to release.
tooltip.wnir.spawner_agitator: Stacks below spawners to boost their speed and range.
tooltip.wnir.spawner_agitator.detail: Each block in the column reduces spawner delay and expands its range.
tooltip.wnir.warding_post: Pushes hostiles away. +6 radius per post.
tooltip.wnir.warding_post.detail: Stack with other column posts. Loot only — no crafting recipe.
tooltip.wnir.teleporter_inhibitor: Cancels teleports in range. +4 radius per post.
tooltip.wnir.teleporter_inhibitor.detail: Affects ender pearls, chorus fruit, and all teleports. Loot only.
tooltip.wnir.repelling_post: Adds radius to a warding column. +4 per post.
tooltip.wnir.repelling_post.detail: No effect on its own — mix with Warding Post. Loot only.
tooltip.wnir.lighting_post.detail: Brightest possible light in a slender post shape. Loot only.
tooltip.wnir.hurt_post: Deals 1 heart per post to nearby hostiles. Bypasses armor.
tooltip.wnir.hurt_post.detail: Magic damage every 4 ticks to all enemies in column radius. Stacks: 2 posts = 2 hearts, etc. Loot only.
tooltip.wnir.silencer_post: Silences entity sounds by 90% within column radius. +4 radius per post.
tooltip.wnir.silencer_post.detail: Client-side attenuation. Affects mob sounds, ambient, etc. Stack posts for larger area. Loot only.
tooltip.wnir.reshaper_post: Trades horizontal reach for vertical. −2 radius, +1 up/down per post.
tooltip.wnir.reshaper_post.detail: Stack with other column posts. Minimum radius clamped to 1. Loot only.
tooltip.wnir.antiwither: Immune to all explosions. Nearly indestructible.
tooltip.wnir.antiwither.detail: Hardness 50, blast resistance 3,600,000. Requires a pickaxe.
tooltip.wnir.ee_clock: Adds extra ticks to the machine above. Stack for more speed.
tooltip.wnir.ee_clock.detail: N clocks = N extra ticks per game tick for the machine directly above or below the column.
tooltip.wnir.ee_clock_budding_crystal: Grows into an EE Clock over time.
tooltip.wnir.ee_clock_budding_crystal.de: Place on an EE Clock column. ~1 Minecraft week per clock in the column. Right-click to check progress.
tooltip.wnir.mossy_hopper: 10-slot hopper that never empties a slot below 1 item.
tooltip.wnir.mossy_hopper.detail: Transfers 2 items per 8 ticks. Right-click to open.
tooltip.wnir.steel_hopper: 10-slot hopper that transfers 8 items per cycle.
tooltip.wnir.steel_hopper.detail: High-throughput hopper. No slot-lock restriction. Right-click to open.
tooltip.wnir.personal_dimension_teleport: Teleports you to your personal dimension.
Requires full hunger. Costs 20 hunger. Place a player skull on top to restrict to owner.
tooltip.wnir.teleporter_crystal: Grows into a Personal Dimension Teleporter.
tooltip.wnir.teleporter_crystal.detail: Place on an EE Clock column. Feed 16 ender pearls by right-clicking. Right-click to check progress.
tooltip.wnir.skull_beehive: Automated turret. Fires arrows at hostile mobs.
tooltip.wnir.skull_beehive.detail: 136-slot inventory: weapons and arrows. Right-click to open. Sneak+right-click to pick up with contents.
tooltip.wnir.accumulator: Passive FE buffer. Base capacity: 1,000,000 FE.
tooltip.wnir.accumulator.detail: Retains charge when mined. Combine multiple in a crafting grid to merge capacity and energy.
tooltip.wnir.celluloser: Converts enchanted books + water + FE → Magic Cellulose.
tooltip.wnir.celluloser.detail: One book fills the 16-bucket output tank. Right-click to open.
tooltip.wnir.spawner: Consumes Magic Cellulose to spawn hostile mobs from the local biome.
tooltip.wnir.spawner.detail: Scans biome on placement. Weighted random mob selection. Each mob costs its XP value. 10 mB/tick drained, 5 XP/tick accumulated. Spawned mobs drop loot credited to the installer.
tooltip.wnir.seed_bundle: Holds 9 stacks of seeds. Right-click a surface to mass-plant.
tooltip.wnir.seed_bundle.detail: Accepts crops, stems, and nether wart. Flood-fills up to 64 adjacent blocks and plants seeds using each seed's own planting logic.
tooltip.wnir.professional_seed_bundle: Holds seeds and harvests mature crops. Right-click to plant or harvest.
tooltip.wnir.professional_seed_bundle.de: Right-click farmland to mass-plant seeds (same as Seed Bundle). Right-click a fully grown crop to flood-fill all connected farmland, harvest every mature crop, reset it to age 0, and drop the yield at your feet.
tooltip.wnir.blue_sticky_tape: Picks up any block with its full NBT state.
tooltip.wnir.blue_sticky_tape.detail: Right-click to lift a block. Right-click a surface to place. Consumed on placement.
tooltip.wnir.mousey_compass: Finds a block type by spiraling outward from you.
tooltip.wnir.mousey_compass.detail: Hold target block in offhand, right-click to search. Right-click again to cancel.
tooltip.wnir.wireless_fuel: Draws FE from a linked block to fuel furnaces.
tooltip.wnir.wireless_fuel.detail: Shift+right-click an energy block to link. 4,000 FE per burn cycle. Never consumed.
tooltip.wnir.magic_cellulose_bucket: Magic Cellulose fluid from the Celluloser.
tooltip.wnir.magic_cellulose_bucket.deta: Pour into the world or use in recipes. Empty bucket returned.
